name: Alice Chen
content: Alice has 7 years of experience in backend development with expertise in Python, PostgreSQL, and REST API design. She has led teams at retail technology startups and managed databases serving millions of transactions daily. Alice is proficient in Docker and has hands-on Kubernetes experience. She holds a BS in Computer Science from Stanford University and is passionate about scalable systems.

name: Bob Martinez
content: Bob is a full stack developer with 4 years of commercial experience. He is proficient in JavaScript, React, Node.js, and has worked with both MongoDB and PostgreSQL. Bob has built e-commerce platforms handling real-time inventory updates. He is self-taught but demonstrates strong problem-solving skills. Experience with AWS and some exposure to TypeScript.

name: Carol Johnson
content: Senior Data Engineer with 6 years of experience in big data technologies. Carol excels in Python, SQL, and Apache Spark. She has built ETL pipelines on Snowflake and Redshift platforms. Carol has managed large-scale data warehouses and has experience with data quality frameworks. She holds an MS in Data Science from MIT and has published papers on data optimization.

name: David Kim
content: DevOps Engineer with 5 years of experience in cloud infrastructure. David is expert in Kubernetes, Docker, and CI/CD pipelines (Jenkins, GitHub Actions). He holds AWS Solutions Architect certification and has hands-on experience with Terraform Infrastructure as Code. David is proficient in Python for automation scripts and has set up Prometheus and Grafana monitoring. Strong Linux administration background.

name: Eva Rodriguez
content: QA Automation Engineer with 3 years of test automation experience. Eva is proficient in Selenium and has written extensive test suites in Python. She has experience with CI/CD integration using Jenkins. Eva knows API testing with Postman and has some exposure to Cypress. She is detail-oriented and advocates for quality-first development practices.

name: Frank Wilson
content: Junior Backend Developer with 2 years of experience. Frank knows Python and JavaScript but is still developing expertise. He has some experience with PostgreSQL but is more comfortable with MongoDB. Frank has built a few REST APIs under supervision. He lacks Kubernetes and Docker experience but is eager to learn. Bachelor's degree in IT.

name: Grace Lee
content: Senior Full Stack Developer with 8 years of experience but primarily in frontend technologies. Grace excels in React, TypeScript, and modern JavaScript frameworks. She has some backend experience with Node.js but limited database expertise. Grace knows Docker basics but lacks Kubernetes and cloud infrastructure knowledge. She would need to upskill on backend-heavy technologies. Masters in Human-Computer Interaction.

name: Henry Brown
content: Data Analyst transitioning to Data Engineering. Henry has 3 years of SQL experience and knows Python for basic scripting. He has never worked with Apache Spark or Snowflake but is completing online certifications. Henry shows strong fundamentals in statistics and data analysis but lacks production data engineering experience. He is motivated and learning quickly.

name: Iris Chen
content: Senior Platform Engineer with 9 years of experience. Iris has deep expertise in Python, PostgreSQL, REST APIs, Kubernetes, Docker, and Terraform. She has worked in multiple domains including retail tech and e-commerce. Iris has strong system design skills and has mentored junior engineers. She knows some data technologies and CI/CD. Very well-rounded engineer seeking new challenges.

name: Jack Thompson
content: QA Lead with 6 years of experience. Jack is expert in Selenium, Cypress, and test automation with Python and JavaScript. He has strong CI/CD integration experience with Jenkins and GitHub Actions. Jack knows API testing and has experience with performance testing tools. However, he has limited data engineering or backend development experience. Excellent for QA but not suitable for backend roles.
